command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41NsuGXnm89dPgc.aed783a1450b --database P3EFPXo6PDntRisxqhyY6k --execute 
-- 1. 更新景点容量
UPDATE attractions SET capacity = 300 WHERE id = 60001; -- 香港太空館
UPDATE attractions SET capacity = 5000 WHERE id = 60002; -- 海洋公園
UPDATE attractions SET capacity = 500 WHERE id = 60003; -- 香港大學
UPDATE attractions SET capacity = 200 WHERE id = 60004; -- 華大基因深圳總部
UPDATE attractions SET capacity = 300 WHERE id = 60005; -- 比亞迪總部
UPDATE attractions SET capacity = 2000 WHERE id = 60006; -- 蓮花山公園
UPDATE attractions SET capacity = 400 WHERE id = 60007; -- 維港遊船

-- 2. 将 itineraries.locationId 关联到对应景点
-- 太空館相关
UPDATE itineraries SET locationId = 60001 WHERE locationName LIKE '%太空館%';
-- 海洋公園相关
UPDATE itineraries SET locationId = 60002 WHERE locationName LIKE '%海洋公園%';
-- 香港大學相关
UPDATE itineraries SET locationId = 60003 WHERE locationName LIKE '%香港大學%';
-- 華大基因相关
UPDATE itineraries SET locationId = 60004 WHERE locationName LIKE '%華大基因%';
-- 比亞迪相关
UPDATE itineraries SET locationId = 60005 WHERE locationName LIKE '%比亞迪%';
-- 蓮花山相关
UPDATE itineraries SET locationId = 60006 WHERE locationName LIKE '%蓮花山%';
-- 維港遊相关
UPDATE itineraries SET locationId = 60007 WHERE locationName LIKE '%維港%';
